results.title: Cinesound Review [compilation]
results.brief_description: A compilation of cinemagazine items: 1. Redex Air Trial begins. 2. Annual oddities: dog collects newspapers. 3. Australia first helicopter test. 4. Deaf and dumb - but they can fight! 5. Romeo and Juliet backyard style. 6. RU Fijians defeat Australia 18-16 2nd test. 7. Redex cars ready for road 9600 mile journey. 8. Lae wrecked by war rebuilds modern New Guinea. 9. Opera rehearsal in open air. 10. Spotting the news: Sydney synagogue. 11. World champion oyster eater - 480 in an hour. 12. Spotting the news: NSW University of Technology officially opened; 1st Australian girl born armless to have artificial limb (New York Hospital). 13. Mildura harvest train brings raisin festival. 14. Vic and NSW head of river. 15. Fun of the fair: Royal Adelaide Show. 16. Spotting the news: Clement Atlee visits Australia; 2GB’s Search for a white crow; Antarctic hits the sub-tropical far north coast of NSW. 17. Heartbreaker: Johnny Ray fascinates females. 18. Feeding time at the zoo. 19. Three services in battle display. 20. Pre-fab houses for flood areas. 21. Royal Easter Show Sydney - features boxing booth. 22. Melbourne’s Royal Show (1954). 23. Female festival: marching girls right in step. 24. Amateurs compete for world’s billiards championship. 25. The bare facts on Gypsy Rose Lee.

results.title: Cinesound Review [1956]
results.brief_description: Australian Newsreel consisting of the following segments: AMAZING SPORTSMANSHIP shows John Landy lending a hand to fellow Australian Ron Clarke during the 1956 Olympic one mile race. Landy recovered the time he lost assisting his team mate and went on to win the race. RAMAZAN shows males from Sydney’s Muslim community ending their month of fasting. MUM THE DENTIST’S HERE records a dentist’s visit to rural Australia. 714 LBS OF MUSCLE AND BRAWN captures the exciting wrestling match between King Kong Ko and Koroshenko. TOUGH BUT NOT DANGEROUS and 6,500 MILE TOUR STARTS follows the Redex Car Rally around Australia captured on film by Cinesound’s Film Unit cameraman Lloyd Shiels.

results.title: Cinesound Review
results.brief_description: Cinemagazine items: 1. National tennis titles - Lew Hoad and Ken Rosewall play doubles against Ron Candy and Mervyn Rose. Ken Rosewall meets Mervyn Rose again in a singles match. 2. A dog that talks - screen story about talking and performing dogs. 3. Shipbuilding a 7,000 ton motor vessel ‘Boonaroo’ launched in Sydeney. 4. Anti-TB drive in schools. 5. Sydney’s Royal Show with a parade of champion livestock and general exhibits.

results.title: Cinesound review
results.brief_description: A compilation of newsreel items from the mid 1950s in Australia including: 1. Olympic walk trials. 2. 5-year-old learns to swim. 3. Breeding of Samoyeds. 4. New Guinea gold. 5. Stunt driver leaps house. 6. Female lifesavers carnival. 7. Impressive diorama of Shaggy Ridge (PNG). 8. Litter of 14 red setters. 9. American female golfer. 10. Bush kids get the drill.

results.title: Cinesound movietone: Memoirs. - Volume 1. (S)
results.creator_credit: Norm Wilkinson, Bluestone Productions and Film World
results.brief_description: In the years before television, Australians flocked to the cinema to see the latest editions of the Cinesound and Movietone News. The three newsreels segments featured are the achievements of three famous Australians: Donald Bradman, Sir William Dobell and Les Darcy. “The Don” as he was affectionately known is regarded as one of the world’s greatest cricketers. His uncanny skill with the bat thrilled audiences as the newsreel captured his exploits. Dobell was one of the most controversial Archibald Prize winners in Australia’s art history, whilst Les Darcy, known as the “Maitland Marvel” was unbeatable in the boxing ring.

constellations_primary.name: Newsreel to nightly news
constellations_primary.description: For decades, newsreel companies covered the news, providing weekly stories of current events, sport, and entertainment to audiences at the cinema, and establishing the format that would be taken up by television and the nightly news.

results.title: Cincinnati automatic cycle press brake
results.brief_description: Shows the machine in action, from forming ‘flat’ sheets of metal on high speed or bending metal perfectly on slow speed. The machine has been revolutionary for workers helping them get the job done faster.
